scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=api-gateway" "npm run dev --workspace=services/auth-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/academic-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/attendance-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/timetable-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/assignment-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/grade-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/career-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/notes-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/fee-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/library-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/forum-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/notification-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/admin-service"
scripts.dev:ml: cd services/ml-service && (test -d venv || python3 -m venv venv) && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -q -r requirements.txt && uvicorn src.main:app --port 3014 --reload
